title: Last Chance to Buy the Kids' Favorite Nex Playground Before It Gets a Price Hike - CNET
summary_full: Last Chance to Buy the Kids' Favorite Nex Playground Before It Gets a Price Hike  CNETRAM shortage forces Nex Playground to raise price to $300 starting April 1  mixvale.com.brFor Nex's upstart console, the buzz is good and the game budgets are low.
